eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Douglas; Lyon; Storey; Carson City, NV; at 1:08 PM on MAY 23, 2019 Effective until 1:23 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Lyon County authorities have issued a required weekly test for Carson City, Lyon, Alpine, Storey and Douglas Counties.  This is only a test. No action required.
